name: Plenti Group Limited
summary: Plenti Group Limited engages in the consumer lending and investment business in Australia and New Zealand. It offers loans for the purchase of new and used vehicles; unsecured loans for the purchase and installation of residential renewable energy equipment, such as solar panels and home batteries; and unsecured loans for a range of purposes, including debt consolidation, home improvement, legal expenses, travel, medical expenses, and other purposes. The company distributes its products through digital marketing or indirectly via third-party introducers. Plenti Group Limited was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Sydney, Australia.
